# MCP Server Project

This is a simple hello world MCP (Model Context Protocol) server built with Node.js and TypeScript, designed to be deployed on Railway.

## Project Overview
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Runtime**: Node.js
- **Protocol**: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- **Deployment**: Railway

## Development Tasks
- [x] Create project structure and configuration files
- [x] Set up TypeScript and Node.js dependencies
- [ ] Install dependencies
- [ ] Build the project
- [ ] Run and test the server
- [ ] Deploy to Railway
